expectations.evidence: Sets both PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN in the config

expectations.text: Advises reloading the shell (source ~/.zshrc) after changes
expectations.evidence: Shows 'source ~/.zshrc' with explanation that it reloads ecosystem.env

expectations.text: Does not expose credentials in any insecure way
expectations.evidence: Credentials stored only in ecosystem.env which is not committed to git
